pages.text: Miss Sunflower is crying. “A thief just stole my pumpkin pie! Now what will I have for dinner?” she sobs.
“Don’t cry Miss Sunflower. We will find your pumpkin pie,” said Officer Zig. “We will catch that crook!” said Officer Zag.
“Look! There he goes!” said Officer Zig. “Catch that crook!” said Officer Zag.
“I’m too fast and you’re too slow. You will never catch the pumpkin pie thief!” cried the crook.
.. l. i l h h e pt u They chased hi m …but the crook was too quick. “I’m too fast and you’re too slow. You will never catch the pumpkin pie thief!”
down They chased him the riverbank but the crook rolled away. “I’m too fast and you’re too slow. You will never catch the pumpkin pie thief!”
under They chased him the bridge “I’m too fast and but the crook swam away. you’re too slow. You will never catch the pumpkin pie thief!”
over They chased him the fires... …but the crook jumped too high. “I’m too fast and you’re too slow. You will never catch the pumpkin pie thief!”
around They chased him the tree “I’m too fast and you’re too slow. but they could not catch the crook. You will never catch the pumpkin pie thief!”
Officer Zig and Officer Zag did not give up. They ran and ran and ran until… into SPLAT! They chased him right a wall!
“Hurray! We caught the crook!” said the cops.
Officer Zig and Officer Zag returned the pumpkin pie to Miss Sunflower. “Thank you very much,” said Miss Sunflower. Dinner time!
